mapper.select: SELECT id AS userId, user_no AS userNo, username AS username, nickname AS nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, gender AS gender, phone AS phone, email AS email, signature AS signature, status AS status FROM im_user WHERE id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_no AS userNo, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, gender, phone, email, signature, status, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_user WHERE username = #{username} AND (#{excludeUserId} IS NULL OR id != #{excludeUserId}) LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: CASE WHEN u.id = #{currentUserId} THEN 'SELF' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM im_friend f WHERE f.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND f.friend_user_id = u.id AND f.status = 2 ) THEN 'BLOCKED_OUT' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM im_friend f WHERE f.user_id = u.id AND f.friend_user_id = #{currentUserId} AND f.status = 2 ) THEN 'BLOCKED_IN' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM im_friend f WHERE f.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND f.friend_user_id = u.id AND f.status = 1 ) THEN 'FRIEND' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM im_friend_request r WHERE r.from_user_id = u.id AND r.to_user_id = #{currentUserId} AND r.status = 0 ) THEN 'PENDING_IN' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM im_friend_request r WHERE r.from_user_id = #{currentUserId} AND r.to_user_id = u.id AND r.status = 0 ) THEN 'PENDING_OUT' ELSE 'NONE' END

( SELECT r.id FROM im_friend_request r WHERE r.status = 0 AND ((r.from_user_id = #{currentUserId} AND r.to_user_id = u.id) OR (r.from_user_id = u.id AND r.to_user_id = #{currentUserId})) ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT 1 )

sql.if: AND ( u.user_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.user_no AS userNo, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.gender AS gender, u.signature AS signature, AS friendStatus, AS pendingRequestId FROM im_user u WHERE u.status = 1 AND u.id != #{currentUserId}
ORDER BY u.updated_at DESC, u.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_user u WHERE u.status = 1 AND u.id != #{currentUserId}

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.user_no AS userNo, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.gender AS gender, u.signature AS signature, u.status AS status, AS friendStatus, AS pendingRequestId, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM im_block_user b WHERE b.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND b.blocked_user_id = u.id) AS blocked FROM im_user u WHERE u.id = #{targetUserId} AND u.status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.user_no AS userNo, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.gender AS gender, u.signature AS signature, u.status AS status, AS friendStatus, AS pendingRequestId, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM im_block_user b WHERE b.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND b.blocked_user_id = u.id) AS blocked FROM im_user u WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.signature AS signature FROM im_user u WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.status = 1 LIMIT 1
